headline: EDITOR'S PICK
title: Your wallpaper just got a heartbeat.
subtitle: Wallnetic transforms your Mac desktop with GPU-accelerated live video wallpapers — six curated sources, per-Space switching, and a floating Dynamic Island control. It's the desktop upgrade you didn't know you needed.

headline: MUST TRY
title: Speak your mind without losing your place.
subtitle: Textream is the teleprompter that lives in your Dynamic Island — scroll hands-free with voice tracking, beam your script to an iPad via Sidecar, and control every session with Director Mode. Your audience will never know.

headline: HIDDEN GEM
title: The prompt IDE your AI workflow deserves.
subtitle: Avalon is a privacy-first visual editor for building and managing AI prompts as structured JSON — with a built-in AI assistant, image reverse-engineering, and direct integration with prompts.chat. Serious prompt craft, beautifully done.

headline: FAN FAVORITE
title: One pixel at a time — can you guess it?
subtitle: Pixel Guess Mobile turns fuzzy images into addictive mobile puzzles, with Skia-powered animations, global leaderboards, streak tracking, and confetti for every win. Easy to pick up, impossible to put down.
